codeReview.summary: The fix adequately resolves the prior regression. The original polish commit over-gated cached diff entry behind live connectivity, while this follow-up restores cached unstaged/staged diff entry and lets recent-commit diff pickers reopen whenever their file targets are already cached, without reopening any live-only git mutations or diff editing.

summary: Pass: reviewed both the original failing diff and the fix diff. The regression is addressed because lane detail no longer treats cached diff inspection as a live-only action, while stage/discard/revert/cherry-pick flows and unstaged diff editing remain gated behind the existing live-action checks.
